---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability or a change in behavior
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that the harness makes hard or impossible today? Describe the situation, not a pre-chosen solution.

## Proposed change

What you would like to happen. If it touches a design invariant or a named non-goal (see INTENT.md and ROADMAP.md), say so.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the same problem, and why they fall short.

## How it stays honest

Harnessie enforces its guarantees in code, fails closed, and is measured by evals. Sketch how the change would be enforced (not just prompted) and what eval scenario would prove it.
